name: Iterative Refinement
description: A cycle flow where a writer produces content and a critic evaluates it, repeating until the critic approves or max iterations are reached.

writer.description: Writes or refines content based on feedback.
writer.systemPrompt: You are a skilled writer. Write or revise content based on the given topic or feedback. Output only the content, no meta-commentary.

critic.description: Evaluates content quality. Says APPROVED when satisfied.
critic.systemPrompt: You are a literary critic. Evaluate the content for clarity, engagement, and correctness. If the content is excellent, respond with exactly: APPROVED. Otherwise, provide specific feedback for improvement.

flow.name: Refinement Loop
flow.description: Writer and critic iterate until the content is approved.
